Fails sanity-27n and following in review-zfs:
https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/30ab3e82-02cb-11e4-a3d2-5254006e85c2

Patch Set 11:

Nathaniel, I don't think this failure is related to the changes. I get this quite routinely on the local setup using the master tree. this is because of the way we calculate objects on ZFS - it's not pre-allocated number like with ldiskfs. so the number isn't very stable and depends on space consumption. thus get_mds_dir() is not reliable.. I'd also add that get_mds_dir() is a quite expensive method and we need something different. like "lfs fid2node .."
